Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; cup_1 accessible.
Right end effector grasps cup_1; table top available for placement.
Postcondition: cup_1 placed on table; right end effector grasps nothing.

Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_2 front accessible.
Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_1 left and right sides accessible.
Postcondition: box_1 grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact.
